name: Vegetables with Peanut Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 Carrots, cut lengthwise and then into thin sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the sauce: Heat 1 cup of water in a saucepan and add peanut butter. Stir until smooth, then set aside.
2. In the same saucepan, heat cooking oil over medium heat. Add chopped onion and cook for 5 minutes.
3. Add all other sauce ingredients (tomatoes, tomato puree, green pepper, allspice, thyme, Scotch Bonnet pepper, paprika, and crumbled vegetable stock cube) to the pan. Stir in the remaining 2 1/2 cups of water.
4. Simmer the sauce for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Prepare the vegetables: Peel plantains and fry in hot oil until brownish on both sides. Drain on paper towels.
6. In a separate pan, melt butter over moderate heat. Add carrots, green beans, and sliced onion. Cook for 15 minutes.
7. Serve the vegetables with plantains, pouring the prepared sauce over top and garnishing with green onions.
